Technology: How has technology changed the way people communicate with their friends and family?
Do you think children spend too much time using technology? Why or why not?
What are the advantages and disadvantages of working from home using technology?
How do you think artificial intelligence will affect jobs in the future?
Do you think social media has made people more or less connected? Explain your answer.
Education: How important do you think it is to learn a foreign language at school?
Do you think university education should be free for everyone? Why or why not?
How has the internet changed the way students learn today compared to the past?
What do you think makes a good teacher? Can you give an example from your own experience?
Do you think exams are the best way to measure a student's ability? What alternatives might work better?
Environment: What do you think is the biggest environmental problem facing your country today?
How much do you think individuals can do to help protect the environment?
Do you think governments should do more to encourage people to use public transport?
How has climate change affected daily life in your country in recent years?
Do you think it is more important to protect the environment or to develop the economy? Why?
Health: How important is it for people to exercise regularly? What are the main benefits?
Do you think governments should ban fast food advertising? Why or why not?
How has the healthcare system in your country changed in recent years?
What do you think people can do to maintain good mental health in today's busy world?
Do you think people are more or less healthy today than they were 50 years ago? Explain why.
Travel: What do you think are the main benefits of travelling to other countries?
Do you think tourism has a positive or negative effect on local communities? Why?
How has the way people travel changed over the last 20 years?
What do you think is the most important thing to consider when planning a trip abroad?
Do you think space tourism will become common in the future? Would you like to try it?
Work & Career: What do you think are the most important qualities for success in the workplace?
Do you think it is better to have one career for life or to change careers several times? Why?
How do you think the workplace will change in the next 10 years?
What do you think is more important in a job — a high salary or job satisfaction? Explain.
Do you think it is important to have a good work-life balance? How can people achieve this?
Society & Culture: How important do you think it is to preserve traditional cultures in a modern world?
Do you think people today have stronger or weaker family bonds than in the past? Why?
How has immigration affected the culture of your country in recent years?
Do you think social media is changing the values of young people? In what way?
What do you think is the most serious social problem in your country today? How could it be solved?
Family & Relationships: How important are family relationships in your culture compared to friendships?
Do you think the role of parents has changed compared to previous generations? How?
How do you think having children affects a person's career and lifestyle?
Do you think it is important to maintain relationships with extended family members? Why?
How has modern life made it more difficult to spend time with family? What can people do about this?
